message: Visit the PFLAG Fort Collins table to learn about our mission to create a caring, just and affirming world for LGBTQ+ people and those who love them. https://pflagfortcollins.org
postClickMessage: We would love to have you come alongside us to make a difference for our LGBTQ+ loved ones! Visit https://pflagfortcollins.org to volunteer, donate and/or become a member.

message: PODER is organizing our community to defend people facing deportation in Northern Colorado. Stop by our table to learn more or make a donation to support local immigrant legal defense. Learn more at https://podernoco.com/

message: If you are interested in MAKING SOME NOISE with us, reach out! It doesn't matter if you:  *Still play regularly *Haven't touched your instrument since high school *Can’t march *Don’t have an instrument! If you want to join us, we’re excited to have you! Loaner instruments available. https://www.notesofdissent.org/
postClickMessage: Mission: To amplify the voices of marginalized communities and activist organizations in the fight against fascism and government oppression. Wanna dust off your old instrument and help us fight fascism with music? Check out our website for rehearsal schedules and Discord discussion. https://notesofdissent.org/contact

message: Visit the AFL-CIO table and learn more about our efforts to engage with CO state legislature to remove obstacles that prevent unions from supporting Colorado workers. Learn more at https://aflcio.org/
postClickMessage: Thank you for visiting the AFL-CIO table. Make sure to write to Gov. Polis and your state representative and ask them to support bill HB26-1005 to remove unnecessary barriers to worker protections and collective bargaining in Colorado. Learn more at https://aflcio.org/
